message:
feat: /health and /healthz endpoint aliases + HS256 JWT secret startup probe

Health endpoints:
- /health now aliases to /health/readiness
- /healthz now aliases to /health/liveness
- Both exact paths bypass bearer-auth (matching the existing /health/*
  prefix behavior)
- ~120 lines of new tests covering response codes, JSON content type,
  POST rejection, and bearer-auth bypass for all four health paths

JWT startup validation:
- Support HTTP_JWT_SECRET as an alternative to HTTP_JWT_JWKS_URL for
  HS256/HS384/HS512 symmetric algorithms
- Validate that HTTP_JWT_SECRET without JWKS only allows HS* algorithms
  (RS256, ES256 etc. fail fast at startup instead of at first request)
- New tests: jwt_without_jwks_or_secret_fails, jwt_with_secret_passes,
  jwt_with_jwks_passes, jwt_secret_with_rs256_fails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
